member.name: T:EvmAddress
member.summary: The ID for a cryptocurrency account on Hedera.

member.name: M:EvmAddress.#ctor(System.Byte[])
member.param: the byte array representation of the address

member.name: M:EvmAddress.FromString(System.String)
member.summary: Convert a string to an ethereum address.

member.name: M:EvmAddress.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Convert a byte array to an ethereum address.
